original_fields.disclosed_assumption: reverse_fan_mode direct effect on Z3 is modeled as zero because the packet does not specify a Z3 delta.

recommendation.basis: Combined state clears all hard criteria; Z1 is threshold-sensitive and therefore flagged warn.

recommendation.basis: Combined state clears all hard criteria; Z1 is threshold-sensitive and therefore flagged warn.

artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
